pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6.Final to 5.4.25.Final to align with Spring Boot 2.x.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to align with Spring Boot 2.x.
Add JAXB runtime dependency explicitly as it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Change packaging from war to jar to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Update Maven compiler plugin to 3.8.1 to ensure proper Java 11 compilation support.
Update Maven Surefire plugin to 3.0.0-M5 for better test execution support.
Update Maven Failsafe plugin to 3.0.0-M5 for better integration test support.
Upgrade MapStruct from 1.0.0.CR1 to 1.4.1.Final for modern annotation processing.
Update Node.js and NPM versions to v14.15.0 and 6.14.10 for frontend tooling compatibility.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new sample application identity.
Update Maven Enforcer plugin to 3.0.0-M3 for modern build constraint enforcement.
Update Checkstyle to 8.38 and plugin to 3.1.1 for modern code style enforcement.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architectural unit testing.
Update Validation API to 2.0.1.Final to align with Jakarta EE standards.
Update Javassist to 3.27.0-GA to align with Hibernate 5.4.
Update Liquibase Hibernate integration to 4.2.2 to align with Hibernate 5.4.
Update Maven Javadoc plugin to 3.2.0 for modern documentation generation.
Update Maven Resources plugin to 3.2.0 for modern resource handling.
Update Maven WAR plugin to 3.3.1 for modern WAR packaging support.
Update Maven Clean plugin to 3.1.0 for modern build cleanup.
Update Maven Eclipse plugin to 2.10 for modern IDE integration.
Update Maven IDEA plugin to 2.2.1 for modern IDE integration.
Add JHipster dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions.
Update Maven prerequisite version to 3.3.9 for modern build tool support.
Add argLine property for JVM arguments during testing.
Add m2e.apt.activation property for Eclipse annotation processing support.
Add empty profile properties for no-liquibase, api-docs, and tls profiles.
Add empty repositories section with JHipster needle for future repository additions.
Add empty pluginRepositories section with JHipster needle for future plugin repository additions.
Add comment placeholder for distribution management configuration.
Update Maven POM XSD schema location to HTTPS URL.
Add explicit project name element for better identification.
Add explicit source and reporting encoding properties for UTF-8.
Add explicit test result directory property for consistent test output location.
Add explicit Maven build timestamp format property.
Remove SonarQube specific properties as they are likely managed differently in newer versions.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed sonar-maven-plugin.version, jacoco-maven-plugin.version, and various sonar.* properties

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove old dependency version properties that are no longer needed or managed by BOM.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed HikariCP.version, assertj-core.version, awaitility.version, commons-io.version, etc.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove old plugin version properties that are no longer needed or managed by BOM.
Remove Spring Boot parent POM in favor of dependency management via BOM.
Remove Maven prerequisites section as it's no longer needed.
Update file permissions from executable (755) to regular file (644).

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and update glob patterns for modern web technologies.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings to specific glob [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and removed obsolete {package,bower}.json rule.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with `* text=auto` and extensive lists for text, binary, documents, and config files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the generated main CSS file to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore static resources copied to the target classes directory during build.
Ignore JavaScript test coverage reports generated by the test runner.
Ignore Node.js temporary directories and debug logs.
Ignore Webpack and Angular cache directories to keep the repository clean.
Ignore Spring Tool Suite 4 specific cache directories.
Ignore IntelliJ IDEA output directories for compiled classes.
Ignore Visual Studio Code configuration and workspace files.
Ignore the Gradle build output directory.
Ensure the Maven Wrapper JAR is not ignored, allowing it to be committed.
Ignore the ESLint cache file to improve linting performance.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Rename the application base name to reflect the new sample application identity.
Change the Java package name to the new sample application namespace.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual JSON booleans for consistency.
Add frontend framework and build tool configuration options required by the newer generator version.
Specify test frameworks in the configuration to enable Gatling and Protractor testing.
Include entity definitions in the generator configuration to regenerate domain models.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster documentation including development, build, and testing instructions.

package.json.general_idea: Update package name, version, and description to reflect the new application identity.
Add license field to package.json metadata.
Add comprehensive npm scripts for backend, frontend, CI, and Docker operations.
Add configuration section for backend port, default environment, and packaging type.
Add Angular core dependencies for the frontend framework.
Add Angular router dependency for navigation.
Add Angular forms dependency for form handling.
Add Angular platform browser dependencies for rendering.
Add Angular compiler dependencies for build process.
Add Angular localize dependency for internationalization support.
Add FontAwesome dependencies for icons.
Add ng-bootstrap dependency for Bootstrap components in Angular.
Add Bootstrap CSS framework dependency.
Add dayjs dependency for date manipulation.
Add ngx-infinite-scroll dependency for scroll handling.
Add ngx-webstorage dependency for local/session storage.
Add RxJS dependency for reactive programming.
Add Swagger UI dependency for API documentation.
Add tslib dependency for TypeScript helpers.
Add zone.js dependency for Angular change detection.
Add Angular CLI dependency for build and serve commands.
Add Angular compiler-cli dependency for AOT compilation.
Add Angular service worker dependency for PWA support.
Add Angular builders for custom webpack and Jest integration.
Add Angular ESLint plugin for linting.
Add OpenAPI generator CLI for API client generation.
Add Jest type definitions for TypeScript support.
Add Chai type definitions for testing assertions.
Add Chai string type definitions for string assertions.
Add Mocha type definitions for testing framework.
Remove Grunt and related task runner dependencies.
Remove Karma and related test runner dependencies.
Remove PhantomJS headless browser dependency.
Remove RequireJS module loader dependency.
Remove Jasmine testing framework dependency.
Remove wiredep dependency for injecting bower components.
Remove Lodash utility library dependency.
Remove xml2js dependency for XML parsing.
Remove Yeoman generator dependency.
Remove JHipster generator dependency from devDependencies.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the embedded H2 database identifier to match the specific application name.
src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.human_impl: Changed 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' and jdbc url to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' and 'jhipsternoi18nsampleapplication'

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Allow remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format instead of the legacy Tomcat JDBC pool properties.
Refactor JPA and Hibernate properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and remove deprecated settings like EJB3NamingStrategy.
Move Liquibase configuration under the spring.liquibase namespace to comply with Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration.
Replace custom cache properties with JHipster-specific cache configuration under the jhipster namespace.
Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark, Graphite) which is no longer supported or configured in this manner in newer JHipster/Spring Boot versions.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for CORS, security, mail, and logging to support framework features.
Configure Spring Boot DevTools for development profile, including restart exclusions and livereload settings.
Define explicit logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and application packages in the dev profile.
Add standard Spring Boot mail properties for the development environment.
Configure Thymeleaf template engine settings, specifically disabling cache for development.
Enable pretty-printing for JSON output in the development profile.
Explicitly disable the H2 console in the dev profile configuration.
Update message cache duration to use ISO 8601 duration format instead of seconds.
Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles list to enable API documentation generation.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver properties to HikariCP standard properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `dataSourceClassName` to `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and moved connection params to `url`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate dialect and database type settings, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.
Migrate cache configuration from root-level properties to JHipster-specific `jhipster.cache` namespace.
Replace legacy Micrometer metrics exporters (Spark, Graphite) with Prometheus configuration.
Standardize logging level configuration using Spring Boot's `logging.level` property.
Enable HTTP response compression for production performance.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `server.compression.enabled: true` with mime-types and min-response-size.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enable graceful shutdown support available in newer Spring Boot versions.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for security, mail, and logging.
Move Liquibase context configuration under the Spring namespace.
Standardize mail configuration under the Spring namespace.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing XHTML mode requirement.
Explicitly disable devtools features in production profile.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management configuration structure.
Update async task configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task` namespace instead of custom `async` properties.
Move mail configuration from custom `mail` namespace to standard `spring.mail` namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `mail.host` with `spring.mail.host` (implied by structure change, though specific values moved to profile-specific files in JHipster, the base structure shifts to spring.mail or jhipster.mail depending on version, here it moves to jhipster.mail for app-specific and removes base mail config).

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Update Swagger documentation properties to align with newer Springfox/SpringDoc conventions used in JHipster 6.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Replaced `swagger.title` with `jhipster.api-docs.title` and updated field names like `termsOfServiceUrl` to `terms-of-service-url`.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Introduce standard Spring Boot 2.x JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
Configure Micrometer metrics export and health probes for Spring Boot 2.x.
Add standard server servlet configuration for session cookies.
